summary: Addressed systems_architect REQUEST_CHANGES by adding failed-first regression coverage for collective bulk primary-office conflicts and unknown enfeoffment granting polity authority. Bulk appointment validation now computes final primary-office holder occupancy before mutation and rejects conflicting batch items with stable bulk-command-rejected item reasons. Enfeoffment now validates grantedByPolityId against M3 polity state before authority and mutation, and polity actor authority requires an existing M3 polity row.

tests_run.result: Failed-first regression run: new tests reproduced invariant fallback for bulk collective primary conflicts and unknown enfeoff grantor polity.
11 test files passed; 65 tests passed. Includes new regression coverage for collective bulk primary-office conflict and unknown enfeoff grantor polity.
Node/worker hashes matched: hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, save/load 28074edd; save/load byte length 10920.
Architecture boundaries passed; deterministic canaries matched; root Vitest 21 files/123 tests passed; web Vitest 1 file/3 tests passed.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M3-APPOINTMENT-ENFEOFFMENT-001

tests_run.result: Modified protocol/sim-core/test files remain from original implementation plus pre-existing project coordination changes and outbox/route files; no forbidden path changes.

decisions: Bulk appointment validation remains all-or-nothing and now checks collective final primary-office exclusivity before commitRuntimeState.
Per-item bulk rejection strings are sorted by itemId and use stable domain reason strings, including office-primary-conflict for collective conflicts.
actorHasPolityAuthority no longer grants polity:<id> authority unless that PolityId exists in state.m3.polities.
sim.enfeoff-district returns explicit bad-id at payload.grantedByPolityId for missing granting polities before authority or invariant fallback.
risks: R3 command/state changes still require systems_architect and QA review before acceptance.
M3 save compatibility remains intentionally unsupported by the existing M3 save refusal guard; no save-format migration was attempted.
requested_action: Re-review the requested R3 validation fixes for bulk appointment collective primary-office exclusivity, enfeoffment granting polity validation, and state-derived actor authority.
